title: San Francisco Historical Society
content: San Francisco Historical Society | Downtown San Francisco. # San Francisco Historical Society. The San Francisco Historical Society engages residents, visitors, and the next generation of history enthusiasts in exploring how San Francisco’s history has shaped its unique identity. They do this through history programs, walking tours, publications, mobile history apps, special events and exhibits, and ongoing collaborations with other local history groups and cultural institutions. ## Upcoming Events. * Walking Tour | 1906 San Francisco Earthquake and Fire. Saturday, Jul 18, 2026  11am - 12:30pm. * Queer History Tour | Unspeakable Vice. * Museum of San Francisco | New City Lab Open House. * Small World, Big City: Scaled Stories of San Francisco Neighborhoods | Exhibition. Sat, Mar 21, 2026 - Sat, Sep 5, 2026. ## What's Nearby. There's so much more to experience in Downtown SF! Joe Hamer Salon San Francisco. ### Parking. 550 California Street Parking Garage. 475 Sansome Street Parking Garage. Bank of America Parking Garage.

title: CALIFORNIA HISTORICAL SOCIETY - CLOSED - Updated June 2026
content: The exhibits always seem so interesting, and they have really great accompanying programs. Currently on view, is an exhibit about the transcontinental railroad.
